sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
print("Current white regions:")
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'W':
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  px={n['pixels']}, r={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, c={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

print("\nCurrent colored markers:")
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] in ['c', 'N', 'p', 'Y'] and n['pixels'] < 10:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  color={n['color']}, px={n['pixels']}, r={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, c={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
